title: Transaction Pinning
description: Transaction pinning exploits relay and mempool rules to block fee-bump or replacement strategies. It is a core risk area for contract protocols that rely on timely confirmation.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Transaction Pinning
resources.notes: Detailed taxonomy of pinning vectors and mitigation proposals.

resources.title: BTC Transcripts Tag: Transaction pinning
resources.notes: Workshop sessions covering realistic attack scenarios.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Package Relay
resources.notes: Current proposal track for reducing contract pinning exposure.
